## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run examples:check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=low`

## Impact Checklist

- [ ] Security impact reviewed
- [ ] Documentation impact reviewed
- [ ] Test or regression coverage added or updated
- [ ] Breaking changes called out clearly
- [ ] Runtime, memory, queue, or state behavior considered

## Notes

Add screenshots, logs, or migration notes when they help reviewers verify the change.
